dark.desc: Vertical carousel slide. Deep midnight navy blueprint paper background with faint cyan architectural grid lines. Top-left tiny monospaced pale-cream tag reading @news
slides: 01/05. Upper area: cyan outlined pill badge reading OUR MONEY. Huge bold pale-cream serif headline center-left reading What they would rather with next line in italic glowing cyan reading spend our money on. Below, medium cream sans-serif subhead reading A budget proposal cuts one bucket by 73 billion dollars and raises another by 445 billion. Bottom dark strip with cyan monospaced text reading OMB FY2027 PROPOSAL // SWIPE. No watermarks, crisp legible typography, every word spelled correctly.

02/05. Large cyan heading top reading PROOF FIRST in bold monospaced style. Center: very large dashed-border cyan card occupying about 60 percent of slide height containing small cream text reading OFFICIAL DOC CROP OR VIDEO STILL GOES HERE. Below card, small cyan monospaced label reading SOURCE: OMB FY2027 TOPLINE. Below that, huge bold pale-cream typographic number minus 73B with glowing cyan edge. Bottom dark strip with cyan monospaced text reading NONDEFENSE DISCRETIONARY SPENDING // 03. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

03/05. Large cyan heading top reading WHAT THAT MEANS in bold monospaced style. Below, big italic pale-cream serif paragraph reading This is not final law. It is the administration's priority list before Congress changes it. Below that, medium cream sans-serif paragraph reading The cut is in nondefense discretionary spending: the civilian side of the budget. Bottom dark strip with cyan monospaced text reading KEEP THE NUANCE ON SCREEN // 04. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

04/05. Cyan heading top reading THE CONTRAST in bold monospaced style. Below two large side-by-side tiles with thin cyan borders on navy. Left tile: huge italic cyan serif word Cut, beneath it cream sans-serif body reading Nondefense spending: down 73 billion dollars, or 10 percent. Right tile: huge italic cyan serif word Spend, beneath it cream sans-serif body reading Defense resources requested: 1.5 trillion dollars, up 445 billion. Bottom dark strip with cyan monospaced text reading SAME SOURCE. SAME PROPOSAL. // 05. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

05/05. Upper-right rotated stamp-style badge in cyan outline reading NOW YOU KNOW. Huge bold italic pale-cream serif headline center reading A budget is a priority list. Below, medium cream sans-serif reading Save the receipt. Share the math. Thin cyan horizontal rule. Below rule, tiny cream monospaced sources paragraph reading Sources: WhiteHouse.gov OMB President's Budget page; FY2027 Topline Fact Sheet, April 2026. Bottom dark strip with cyan monospaced text reading OUR MONEY // SHARE. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

receipt.desc: Vertical carousel slide. Background: warm off-white receipt paper with faint horizontal thermal-print scan lines and subtle paper grain. Top edge has a dashed tear-off perforation line. Left margin has a vertical row of small circular perforation dots. Top-left tiny black monospaced receipt-style tag reading @news. Overall aesthetic: thermal receipt, till slip, ledger paper. Dominant colors: warm cream receipt white, deep black ink text, muted ink-red rubber-stamp accents, occasional handwritten royal-blue pen annotation.
slides: 01/05. Upper area: black outlined rectangular stamp-style badge reading OUR MONEY with small monospaced line below reading RECEIPT #2027. Huge bold black slab-serif headline center reading What they would rather with next line in ink-red slab-serif reading spend our money on. Thin dashed black horizontal rule under headline. Below, medium black monospaced subhead reading A budget proposal cuts one bucket by 73 billion dollars and raises another by 445 billion. Bottom strip with dashed tear-off border, black monospaced text reading OMB FY2027 PROPOSAL // SWIPE. No watermarks, crisp legible typography, every word spelled correctly.

02/05. Large black slab-serif heading top reading PROOF FIRST. Center: very large dashed-border black rectangular card occupying about 60 percent of slide height on receipt-cream fill, containing small black monospaced text reading OFFICIAL DOC CROP OR VIDEO STILL GOES HERE. A muted ink-red rubber stamp at top-right corner of card reading FILED. Below card, small black monospaced label reading SOURCE: OMB FY2027 TOPLINE. Below that, huge bold ink-red typographic number minus 73B with deep ink shadow. Bottom dashed-border strip with black monospaced text reading NONDEFENSE DISCRETIONARY SPENDING // 03. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

03/05. Large black slab-serif heading top reading WHAT THAT MEANS. Below, big black handwritten italic script paragraph reading This is not final law. It is the administration's priority list before Congress changes it. Below that, medium black monospaced paragraph reading The cut is in nondefense discretionary spending: the civilian side of the budget. A royal-blue handwritten pen arrow annotation points at the word nondefense with pen caption reading civilian side. Bottom dashed-border strip with black monospaced text reading KEEP THE NUANCE ON SCREEN // 04. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

04/05. Black slab-serif heading top reading THE CONTRAST. Below two large side-by-side receipt columns with thin dashed black borders on cream. Left column: huge ink-red slab-serif word Cut with slightly smudged rubber-stamp effect, beneath it black monospaced body reading Nondefense spending: down 73 billion dollars, or 10 percent. Right column: huge ink-red slab-serif word Spend with stamp effect, beneath it black monospaced body reading Defense resources requested: 1.5 trillion dollars, up 445 billion. Thin dashed black vertical rule between columns. Bottom dashed-border strip with black monospaced text reading SAME SOURCE. SAME PROPOSAL. // 05. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.

05/05. Upper-right rotated rubber-stamp-style badge in ink-red reading NOW YOU KNOW with slightly smudged ink edge. Huge bold black slab-serif headline center reading A budget is a priority list. Below, medium black handwritten italic reading Save the receipt. Share the math. Thin dashed black horizontal rule. Below rule, tiny black monospaced sources paragraph reading Sources: WhiteHouse.gov OMB President's Budget page; FY2027 Topline Fact Sheet, April 2026. Bottom dashed-border strip with black monospaced text reading OUR MONEY // SHARE. Bottom edge has dashed tear-off perforation line with circle marks. No watermarks, crisp legible typography.
